title: centaurea biebersteinii subsp. radoslavoffii
intro: Centaurea biebersteinii subsp. radoslavoffii, also known as Mountain centaury, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mountain centaury include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems, in addition to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. Herbal preparations of Centaurea biebersteinii subsp. radoslavoffii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
